items.title: GENIUS Act stand-off: Phantom, Consensys oppose OCC’s stablecoin yield ban
items.whyYouShouldCare: The opposition to the OCC's stablecoin yield ban from key players like Phantom and Consensys could influence regulatory outcomes affecting Solana's ecosystem.

items.title: Stellar’s correction is here – But THESE 2 trends still back XLM bulls
items.whyYouShouldCare: Despite recent corrections, ongoing trends supporting XLM may indicate resilience in the broader crypto market, which could indirectly impact SOL's positioning.

items.title: Crypto industry will be ‘just fine’ if CLARITY Act doesn’t pass: Chris Perkins
items.whyYouShouldCare: Chris Perkins' confidence in the crypto industry's stability without the CLARITY Act suggests that Solana's ecosystem may remain robust amid regulatory uncertainties.
